short:
Represent company in front of the client on operational level
Maintained SLA within contract targets
Developed an end-to-end go-through communication business process considering four different stakeholders
Handling customer escalations and defend vendor's position on complex cases
Took over all communication with the client on escalated issues
Became single point of contact for management teams of both sides
Hired a frontline team, trained and launched it live within half a year
Developed contractual reporting from scratch
full:
As the primary operational representative of the company, I took on the crucial responsibility of ensuring seamless interactions with the client. My role required maintaining a proactive approach to understanding client needs, addressing concerns, and ensuring smooth operational delivery. By fostering a collaborative relationship, I was able to position the company as a trusted partner in achieving shared business goals.

Meeting service level agreements (SLAs) within contractual targets was a top priority. I developed an end-to-end communication business process that effectively accounted for the requirements of four distinct stakeholders. This approach not only improved workflow efficiency but also ensured timely and accurate communication, resulting in enhanced client satisfaction and stronger alignment between teams.

Customer escalations demanded a delicate balance of tact and assertiveness. I consistently defended the company’s position on complex cases while maintaining transparency with the client. By taking over all communication on escalated issues, I provided clarity and resolution, reinforcing trust. This allowed me to serve as the single point of contact for management teams on both sides, ensuring smooth and consistent communication at all levels.

Recognizing the need for a strong frontline team, I led efforts to recruit, train, and launch the team within six months. This initiative involved developing training programs, equipping team members with the necessary skills, and establishing operational workflows. The team's quick and efficient deployment contributed significantly to meeting client expectations from the outset.

To meet the client’s demands for transparent and actionable insights, I developed contractual reporting from scratch. This initiative involved identifying key performance metrics, designing reporting formats, and establishing a delivery process that highlighted operational successes while addressing areas for improvement. The reporting became a valuable tool for decision-making and further solidified the client’s confidence in the company’s capabilities.

short:

Handled client’s escalations

Onboarding process was launched and enabled new team members getting started in short period of time
Adopted service model for new rolling out features and products
Trained a successor for myself

Created service unit for b2c customers from scratch
Integrated support team into development process for fast knowledge adoption
Successfully serviced few live product demonstrations on large public events

Represent vendor in front of two major clients on operational level
Prepared and driven transition of Service Catalog, educated customer personnel for smoothest transition
Developed and established a streamlined communication protocol between L2 and L3 engineering teams
Reorganized internal knowledge base for better availability to L1 personnel

Developed process transition matrix for client’s operation personnel
Setup product support service for remote operations
Transitioned services to local teams as a comprehensive deliverables bundle
